title: Felicia Doan
compiled_truth: Felicia Doan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-02-26), Felicia Doan sent 9 and received 152 emails, totalling 161 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rudy Acevedo](people/rudy-acevedo) (9), [Diana Allen](people/diana-allen) (9), [Russell Ballato](people/russell-ballato) (9), [Ted Ballinger](people/ted-ballinger) (9), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (9).
